props.name: confirmLabel
props.description: Label of the confirming button. Defaults to the i18n catalog's "Confirm".

props.name: cancelLabel
props.description: Label of the cancelling button (also the Escape action). Defaults to "Cancel".

props.name: confirmVariant
props.description: Variant of the confirm button (`"danger"` for a destructive-ish confirm).

props.name: triggerVariant
props.description: Visual variant for the trigger Button.

props.name: onConfirm
props.description: Called when the confirm button is pressed (before the dialog closes).

props.name: closeOnOutsideClick
props.description: Whether pressing the backdrop cancels and closes. Defaults to `true`.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called whenever the open state changes.
